framework.name: VIC X-Pay + MLE Security Stack
framework.description: Visa uses HMAC-SHA256 X-Pay tokens for API auth plus JWE Message Level Encryption for payload security. This is traditional API security, not a novel agent-auth paradigm — contrast with Mastercard's cryptographic intent signing.
framework.raw_quote: X-Pay token authentication (HMAC-SHA256)... VicApiClient: VIC APIs with automatic MLE encryption/decryption

source.title: Visa Intelligent Commerce (VIC) - Integration Starter Kit
